title: North West Provincial Gazette vol 255 no 6961 dated 08 February 2012

8 FEBRUARIE 2012

2 No. 6961 PROVINCIAL GAZETTE EXTRAORDINARY, 8 FEBRUARY 2012
IMPORTANT NOTICE
The Government Printing Works will not be held responsible for faxed documents not received due
to errors on the fax machine or faxes received which are unclear or incomplete. Please be advised
that an "OK" Slip, received from a fax machine, will not be accepted as proof that documents were
received by the GPW for printing. If documents are faxed to the GPW it will be the sender's respon
sibility to phone and confirm that the documents were received in good order.
Furthermore the Government Printing Works will also not be held responsible for cancellations and
amendments which have not been done on original documents received from clients.

BUITENGEWONE PROVINSIALE KOERANT. 8 FEBRUARIE 2012 No. 6961 3
GENERAL NOTICES • ALGEMENE KENNISGEWINGS
NOTICE 134 OF 2012
DEPARTMENT OF CO-OPERATIVE GOVERNANCE AND TRADITIONAL AFFAIRS
NOTICE IN TERMS OF SECTION 16(3)(c) OF THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT: MUNICIPAL STRUCTURES ACT,
1998 (ACT NO. 117 OF 1998): EMNAMBITHI MUNICIPALITY
1. The Member of the KwaZulu-Natal Executive Council responsible for Co-operative Governance and
Traditional Affairs. in her capacity as Member of the Executive Council responsible for Co-operative Governance.
and under the powers vested in her by section 16( 1) of the Local Government Structures Act, 1998 lAct No. 117 of
1998), to amend the notice issued in terms of section 12 ofthe said Act, and in order to give effect to a decision by the
Municipal Council of the Emnambithi Municipality to designate a certain councillor as full-time, proposes to pubhsh
the following notice:
.,, Nomusa Dube, Member of the KwaZulu-Natal Executive Council responsible for local govemment,
under the powers vested in me by section 18(4) of the Local Government: Municipal Structures Act, 1998
(Act No. 117 of 1998), hereby determine that the municipality listed in Column 1 of the Schedule hereto may
deSignate as full-time the councillor listed in Column 2 of the said Schedule".
SCHEDULE
COLUMN 1 COLUMN 2
NAME OF MUNICIPAUTY COUNCILLOR DESIGNATED AS FULL-TIME
Emnambithi Municipality Whip
2. The public and interested parties are invited to submit comments on the proposed amendment in writing by no
later than seven (7) days after the date of publication hereof, by-
(a) post to the Head of Department: Co-operative Governance and Traditional Affairs, Pietermaritzburg,
Private Bag X9123, 3200;
(b) hand to the 3rd Floor. Southern Life Plaza, 271 Church Street, Pietermaritzburg. 3201. Attention: Mr R
Dantuma;
(c) facsimile to (033) 355 6554; or
(d) e-mail torob.dantuma@kzncogta.gov.za.

4 No. 6961 PROVINCIAL GAZETTE EXTRAORDINARY, 8 FEBRUARY 2012
KENNISGEWING 134 VAN 2012
OEPARTEMENT VAN KOOPERATIEWE REGERING EN TRAOISIONELE SAKE
KENNISGEWING INGEVOLGE ARTIKEL 16(3)(c) VAN DIE WET OP PLAASLIKE REGERING: MUNISIPALE
STRUKTURE, 1998 (WET NO. 117 VAN 1998): EMNAMBITHI MUNISIPALITEIT
1. Die lid van die KwaZulu-Natal se Uitvoerende Raad verantwoordelik vir KoOperatiewe Regering en Tradisionele
Sake, in haar hoedanigheid as Lid van die Uitvoerende Raad verantwoordelik vir Ko6peratiewe Regering, en
kragtens die bevoegdheid aan haar verleen deur artikel 16(1) van die Wet op Plaaslike Regering: Munisipale
Strukture, 1998 (Wet No. 117 van 1998), om die kennisgewing uitgereik ingevolge artikel 12 van die genoemde Wet
te wysig, en om uitvoering te gee aan die besluit deur die Munisipale Raad van die Emnambithi munisipaliteit om 'n
sekere raadslid as voltyds te benoem, is van voorneme om die volgende kennisgewing te publiseer:
"Ek, Nomusa Dube, Lid van die KwaZulu-Natal se Uitvoerende Raad verantwoordelik vir plaaslike regering,
kragtens die bevoegdheid aan my verleen as gevolg van artikeI18(4) van die Wet op Plaaslike Regering:
Munisipale Strukture, 1998 (Wet No. 117 van 1998), bepaal hiermee dal die munisipaliteit in Kolom 1 van
die Bylae hieronder die volgende raads/id in Kolom 2 van die genoemde Bylae voltyds mag benoem".
BYLAE
KOLOM1 KOLOM2
NAAM VAN MUNISIPALITErr RAADSLID VASGESTEL OM VOL TYDS BENOEM TE WORD
Emnambithi Munisipaliteit Sweep
2. Die publiek en belanghebbendes word uitgenooi om skriftelike kommentaar oor die voorgestelde wysiging nie
later nie as sewe (7) dae na publikasie van die kennisgewing in te dien, per -
(a) pos aan die Departementshoof: Kooperatiewe Regering en Tradisionele Sake, Privaatsak X9123,
Pietermaritzburg, 3200;
(b) hand na die 3de Vloer, Southern life Plaza, Kerkstraat 271, Pietermaritzburg, 3201, Aandag: Mnr R
Dantuma;
(e) taks na: (033) 3556554; of
(d) e-pos aan: rpb.dantuma@kzncogta.gov,za.

BUITENGEWONE PROVINSIALE KOERANT, 8 FEBRUARIE 2012 No. 6961 5
NOTICE 134 OF 2012
UMNYANGO WEZOKUBUSA NGOKUBAMBISANA NEZOMDABU
ISAZISO NGOKWESIGABA 16(3)(c) SOMTHETHO WEZINHLAKA ZOMASIPALA WOHULUMENI BASEKHAYA.
1998 (UMTHETHO NO. 117 KA 1998): UMASIPALA WASEMNAMBITHI
1.ILungu loMkhandlu oPhethe KwaZulu-Natali elibhekele ezokuBusa ngokuBambisana nezoMdabu, ngokwesikhundla
salo njengeLungu 10Mkhandiu oPhethe elibhekele ezohulumeni basekhaya, nangokwamandla eliwanikezwe isigaba
16(1) soMthetho weziNhlaka zoMasipala woHulumeni baseKhaya, 1998 (uMthetho No. 117 ka 1998), okuchibiyela
isaziso esikhishwe ngokwesigaba 12 soMthetho okukhulunywe ngawo, nangenhloso yokuqalisa ukusebenza
kwesinqumo soMkhandiu kaMasipata waseMnambithi sokuqoka ikhansela elithile elizosebenza ngokugcwele. lihlose
ukushicilela lesi saziso:
"Mina, Nomusa Dube, iLungu loMkhandlu oPhethe KwaZulu-Natali elibhekele ezohulumeni basekhaya,
ngokwamandla engiwanikezwe isigaba 18(4) soMthetho weziNhlaka zoMasipala woHulumeni baseKhaya,
1998 (uMthetho No. 117 ka 1998), ngalokhu nginquma ukuthi umasipala obalulwe oHlwini 1 loHlelo
olungezansi ungaqoka ikhansela elibalulwe oHlwini 2 loHlelo njengelizosebenza ngokugcwele".
UHLELO
UHLU1 UHLU2
IGAMA UKAMASIPALA IKHANSELA EUQOKELWA UKUSEBENZA NGOKUGCWELE
UMasipala waseMnambithi USotswebhu
2. Umphakathi nabantu abanentshisekelo bayamenywa ukuba balethe izimvo zabo ezibhalwe phansi mayelana nalesi
sichibiyelo esihlongozwayo zingakedluli izinsuku eziyisikhombisa (7) kusukela osukwini okushicilelwe ngalo lesi saziso
(a) ngeposi kwiNhloko yoMnyango wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana nezoMdabu, Pietermaritzburg. Private
Bag X9123, 3200;
(b) ngesandla e-3rd Floor, Southern life Plaza, 271 Church Street, Pietermaritzburg, 3201, zibhekiswe ku: Mr
R Dantuma;
(e) ngefeksi ku: (033) 355 6554; noma
(d) nge-imeyili ku: rob.dantuma@kzneogta.gov.za.

6 No. 6961 PROVINCIAL GAZETTE EXTRAORDINARY, 8 FEBRUARY 2012
NOTICE 135 OF 2012
DEPARTMENT OF CO"()PERATIVE GOVERNANCE AND TRADITIONAL AFFAIRS
NOTICE IN TERMS OF SECTION 16(3){c) OF THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT: MUNICIPAL STRUCTURES ACT,
1998 (ACT NO. 117 OF 1998): NONGOMA MUNICIPALITY
1. The Member of the KwaZulu-Natal Executive Council responsible for Co-operative Govemance and Traditional
Affairs, in her capacity as Member of the Executive Council responsible for Co-operative Govemance, and under the
powers vested in herby section 16(1)ofthe Local Government Structures Act, 1998 (Act No. 117 of 1998), to amend
to
the notice issued in terms of section 12 of the said Act, and in order to give effect a decision by the Municipal
Council of the Nongoma Municipality to designate certain councillors as full-time, proposes to publish the following
notice:
"', Nomusa Dube, Member of the KwaZulu-Natal Executive Council responsible for local government, under
the powers vested in me by section 18(4) ofthe Local Government: Municipal Structures Act, 1998 (Act No.
117 of 1998), hereby determine that the municipality listed in Column 1 of the Schedule hereto may
designate the councillors listed in Column 2 of the said Schedule as full-time".
SCHEDULE
COLUMN 1 COLUMN 2
NAME OF MUNICIPALITY COUNCILLOR DESIGNATED AS FULL-TIME
Nongoma Municipality Speaker
Mayor
Deputy Mayor
Six Members of the Executive Committee
i
2. The public and interested parties are invited to submit written comments on the proposed amendment by no later
than seven (7) days after the date of publication hereof, by-
(a) post to the Head of Department: Co-operative Governance and Traditional Affairs, Pietermaritzburg,
Private Bag X9123, 3200;
(b) hand to the 3rd Floor. Southern Life Plaza, 271 Church Street, Pietermaritzburg, 3201, Attention: Mr R
Dantuma;
(c) facsimile to (033) 3556554; or
(d) e-mail torob.dantuma@kzncogta.gov.za.

BUITENGEWONE PROVINSIALE KOERANT, 8 FEBRUARIE 2012 No. 6961 7
KENNISGEWING 135 VAN 2012
DEPARTEMENT VAN KOOPERATIEWE REGERING EN TRADISIONELE SAKE
KENNISGEWING INGEVOLGE ARTIKEL 16(3)(c) VAN DIE WET OP PLAASLIKE REGERING: MUNISIPALE
STRUKTURE. 1998 (WET NO. 117 VAN 1998): NONGOMA MUNISIPALITEIT
1. Die Lid van die KwaZulu-Natal se Uitvoerende Raad verantwoordelik vir Ko~peratiewe Regering en Tradisionele
Sake, in haar hoedanigheid as Lid van die Uitvoerende Raad verantwoordelik vir KoCiperatiewe Regering en kragtens
die bevoegdheid aan haar veneen deur artikel 16( 1 ) van die Wet op Plaaslike Regering: Munisipale Strukture, 1998
(Wet No. 117 van 1998), om die kennisgewing uitgereik ingevolge artikel12 van die genoemde Wet te wysig, en om
uitvoering te gee aan die besluit deur die Munisipale Raad van die Nongoma Munisipaliteit om die volgende
raadslede as voltyds te benoem, is van voorneme om die volgende kennisgewing te publiseer:
"Ek, Nomusa Dube, Lid van die KwaZulu-Natal se Uitvoerende Raad verantwoordelik vir Kooperatiewe
Regering, ingevolge die bevoegdheid aan my verleen deur artikeI18(4) van die Wet op Plaaslike Regering:
Munisipale Strukture, 1998 (Wet No. 117 van 1998), bepaal hiermee dat die munisipaliteit genoem in
Kolom 1 van die Bylae hieronder die volgende raadslede genoem in kolom 2 van die genoemde Bylae as
voltyds mag benoem" .
BYLAE
KOLOM1 KOLOM2
NAAM VAN MUNISIPALITEIT RAADSLID VASGESTEL OM VOLTYDS BENOEM TE WORD
Nongoma Munisipaliteit Speaker
Burgemeester
Onderburgemeester
Ses Lede van die Uitvoerende Raad
2. Die publiek en belanghebbendes word uitgenooi om skriftelike kommentaar op die voorgestelde wysiging nie later
nie as sewe (7) dae na publikasie van die kennisgewing in te dien, per-
(a) pos aan die Departementshoot Kooperatiewe Regering en Tradisionele Sake, Privaatsak X9123,
Pietermaritzburg, 3200;
(b) hand na die 3de Vloer, Southern Life Plaza, Kerkstraat 271, Pietermaritzburg, 3201, Aandag: Mnr R
Dantuma;
(e) faks na: (033) 3556554; of
(d) e-pos aan: rob.dantuma@kzncogta.gov.za.

8 No. 6961 PROVINCIAL GAZETTE EXTRAORDINARY, 8 FEBRUARY 2012
NOTICE 135 OF 2012
UMNYANGO WEZOKUBUSA NGOKUBAMBISANA NEZOMDABU
ISAZISO NGOKWESIGABA 16(3)(c) SOMTHETHO WEZINHLAKAZOMASIPALA WOHULUMENI BASEKHAYA,
1998 (UMTHETHO NO. 117 KA 1998): UMASIPALA WAKWANONGOMA
1.ILungu loMkhandlu oPhethe KwaZulu-Natali elibhekele ezokuBusa ngokuBambisana nezoMdabu, ngokwesikhundla
sale njengeLungu loMkhandlu oPhethe elibhekele ezokuBusa ngokuBambisana nezoMdabu, nangokwamandla
eliwanikezwe isigaba 16(1) soMthetho weziNhlaka zoMasipala woHulumeni baseKhaya, 1998 (uMthetho No. 117 ka
1998). okuchibiyela isaziso eSikhishwe ngokwesigaba 12 soMthetho okukhulunywe ngawo. nangenhloso yokuthi
kuqale ukusebenza izinqumo zomKhandlu kaMasipala wakwaNongoma zokuthi kuqokwe amakhansela athile
abalulwe ngezansi azosebenza ngokugcwele. lihlongoza ukushicilela lesi saziso esilandelayo:
"Mina. Nomusa Cube, iLungu 10Mkhandiu oPhethe KwaZulu-Natali elibhekele ezokubusa ngokubambisana,
ngokwamandla engiwanikezwe isigaba 18(4) soMthetho weziNhlaka zoMasipala woHulumeni baseKhaya,
1998 (uMthetho No. 117 ka 1998). ngalokhu nginquma ukuthi umasipala obalulwe oHlwini 1 loHlelo
olungezansi ungaqoka la makhansela abalulwe oHlwini 2 Iwalolu Hlelo njengazosebenza ngokugcwele."
UHLELO
IGAMA LlKAMASIPALA IKHANSELA ELlQOKELWE UKUSEBENZA NGOKUGCWELE
!
UMasipala wakwaNongoma uSomlomo
uSodolobha
uSekela kaSodolobha
amaLungu ayisiThupha eKomidi eliPhethe i
2. Umphakathi nabantu abanentshisekelo bayamenywa ukuba balethe izimvo zabo ezibhalwe phansi mayelana nalesi
sichibiyelo ezinsukwini eziyisikhombisa (7) kusukela osukwini okushicilelwe ngalo lesi saziso, -
(a) ngeposi kwiNhloko yoMnyango wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana nezoMdabu. Private Bag X9123.
Pietermaritzburg. 3200;

kuMnu. R Cantuma;

BUITENGEWONE PROVINSIALE KOERANT, 8 FEBRUARIE 2012 No. 6961 9
NOTICE 136 OF 2012
DEPARTMENT OF CO-OPERATIVE GOVERNANCE AND TRADITIONAL AFFAIRS
NOTICE IN TERMS OF SECTION 16(3)(c) OF THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT: MUNICIPAL STRUCTURES ACT, 1998 (ACT NO.
117 OF 1998): DETERMINATION OF FULL-TIME SPEAKER - uPHONGOLO MUNICIPALITY
I, Nomusa Dube, in my capacity as Member of the KwaZulu-Natal Executive Council responsible for local govemment. and under
the powers vested in me by section 18(4) of the Local Government: Municipal Structures Act, 1998 (Act No. 117 of 1998). hereby
determine that the uPhongolo Municipality may designate the Speaker of the uPhongolo Municipal Council as full-time.
Given under my Hand at Pietermaritzburg on this 28th day of November. Two Thousand and Eleven.
MS N DUBE MPL
Member of the Executive Council of the Province of KwaZulu-Natal
responsible for Local Government
• ••
KENNISGEWING 136 VAN 2012
DEPARTEMENT VAN KOOPERATIEWE REGERING EN TRADISIONELE SAKE
KENNISGEWING INGEVOLGE ARTIKEL 16(3)(c) VAN DIE WET OP PLAASLIKE REGERING: WET OP MUNISIPALE
STRUKTURE. 1998 (WET NO. 117 VAN 1998): VASSTELLING VAN VOLTYDSE SPEAKER - uPHONGOLO
MUNISIPALITEIT
Ek. Nomusa Dube, in my hOedanigheid as Ud van die KwaZulu-Natal Uitvoerende Raad verantwoordelik vir plaaslike regering en
deur die magle wat ingevolge artikel 18(4) van die Wet op Plaaslike Regering: Munisipale Strukture. 1998 (Wet No. 117 van
1998). in my gesetel is. bepaal hiermee dat die uPhongolo Munisipaliteit die Speaker van die uPhongolo Munisipaliteit as voltyds
magbenoem.
Gegee onder my Hand te Pietermaritzburg op hierdie 28ste dag van November, Tweeduisend-en-elf.
MENDUBELPW
Ud van die Uitvoerende Raad van die Provinsie van KwaZulu-Natal
verantwoordelik vir Plaaslike Regering

10 No. 6961 PROVINCIAL GAZETTE EXTRAORDINARY, 8 FEBRUARY 2012
NOTICE 136 OF 2012
UMNYANGO WEZOKUBUSA NGOKUBAMBISANA NEZOMDABU
ISAZISO NGOKWESIGABA 16(3)(c) SOMTHETHO WEZINHLAKA ZOMASIPALA WOHULUMENI BASEKHAYA, 1998
(UMTHETHO NO. 117 KA 1998): ISINQUMO SOKUQOKWA KUKASOMLOMO OZOSEBENZA NGOKUGCWELE
KUMASIPALA WASOPHONGOLO
Mina, Nomusa Dube, iLungu loMkhandlu oPhethe KwaZulu-Natali elibhekele ezokubusa ngokubambisana, ngokwamandla
engiwanikezwe isigaba 18(4) soMthetho weziNhlaka zoMasipala woHulumeni baseKhaya, 1998 (uMthetho No. 117 ka 1998),
ngalokhu lapha nginquma ukuthi uMasipala wasoPhongolo ungaqoka uSomlomo woMkhandlu kaMasipala wasoPhongolo
njengozosebenza ngokugcwele.
Sikhishwe ngaphansi kweSandla sami eMgungundlovu ngalolu suku lamhla zjngama-28 kuLwezi, oNyakeni weziNkulungwane
eziMbili neShumi naNye.
NKSZ. N DUBE, iLungu leslShayamthethetho sesiFundazwe
ILungu loMkhandlu oPhethe esiFundazweni saKwaZulu-Natali
elibhekele ukuBusa ngokuBambisana

BUITENGEWONE PROVINSIALE KOERANT. 8 FEBRUARIE 2012 No. 6961 11
NOTICE 137 OF 2012
DEPARTMENT OF CO"()PERATIVE GOVERNANCE AND TRADITIONAL AFFAIRS
NOTICE IN TERMS OF SECTION 16(3)(c) OF THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT: MUNICIPAL STRUCTURES ACT, 1998 (ACT NO.
117 OF 1998): DETERMINATION OF ONE ADDITIONAL FULL·TIME MEMBER OF THE EXECUTIVE COMMITTEE - UGU
DISTRICT MUNICIPALITY
I, Nomusa Dube, in my capacity as Member of the Kwazulu-Natal Executive Council responsible for local government, and under
the powers vested in me by section 18(4) of the local Government: Municipal Structures Act, 1998 (Act No. 117 of 1998). hereby
determine that the Ugu District Municipality may designate the position of one additional Executive Committee member of the
Ugu District Municipal Council as full-time.
Given under my Hand at Pietermaritzburg on this 28th day of November. Two Thousand and Eleven.
MSN DUBEMPL
Member of the Executive Council of the Province of Kwazulu-Natal
responsible for Local Government
• - I
KENNISGEWING 137 VAN 2012
DEPARTEMENT VAN KOOPERATIEWE REGERING EN TRADISIONELE SAKE
KENNISGEWING INGEVOLGE ARTIKEL 16(3)(c) VAN DIE WET OP PLAASLIKE REGERING: WET OP MUNISIPALE
STRUKTURE, 1998 (WET NO. 117 VAN 1998): VASSTELLING VAN EEN ADDISIONELE VOLTYDSE LID VAN DIE
UITVOERENDE RAAD - UGU DISTRIK MUNISIPALITEIT
Ek. Nomusa Dube, in my hoedanigheid as Lid van die KwaZulu-Natal Uitvoerende Raad verantwoordelik vir plaaslike regering en
deur die magte wat ingevolge artikeI18(4) van die Wet op Plaaslike Regering: Munisipale Strukture. 1998 (Wet No. 117 van
1998), in my gesetel is, bepaal hiermee dal die Ugu Distrik Munisipaliteit die posisie van een addisionele lid van die Uitvoerende
Raad as voltyds mag benoem.
Gegee onder my Hand te Pietermaritzburg op hierdie 28ste dag van November, Tweeduisend-en-elf.
MEN DUBELPW
lid van die Uitvoerende Raad van die Provinsie van KwaZulu-Natal
verantwoordelik vir Plaaslike Regering

12 No. 6961 PROVINCIAL GAZETTE EXTRAORDINARY, 8 FEBRUARY 2012
NOTICE 137 OF 2012
UMNYANGO WEZOKUBUSA NGOKUBAMBISANA NEZOMDABU
ISAZISO NGOKWESIGABA 16(3)(c) SOMTHETHO WEZJNHLAKA ZOMASIPALA WOHULUMENI BASEKHAYA, 1998
(UMTHETHO NO. 117 KA 1998): ISINQUMO SOKWENGEZWA KWELUNGU ELiLODWA EKOMIDINI ELlKHULU
KUMASIPALA WESIFUNDA UGU
Mina, Nomusa Dube, iLungu loMkhandlu oPhethe KwaZulu-Natali elibhekele ezokubusa ngokubambisana, ngokwamandla
engiwanikezwe isigaba 18(4} soMthetho weziNhlaka zoMasipala woHulumeni baseKhaya, 1998 (uMthetho No. 117 ka 1998),
ngalokhu nginquma ukuthi uMasipala wesiFunda Ugu ungaqoka elinye i1ungu eKomidini eliKhulu 10Mkhandiu kaMasipala
wesiFunda Ugu elizosebenza ngokugcwele.
Sikhishwe ngaphansi kweSandla sami eMgungundlovu ngalolu suku lamhla zingama-28 kuLwezi. oNyakeni weziNkulungwane
eziMbili neShumi naNye.
NKSZ. N DUBE. iLungu lesiShayamthethetho sesiFundazwe
ILungu loMkhandlu oPhethe esiFundazweni saKwaZulu-Natali
elibhekele ezokuBusa ngokuBambisana
